rationale: Response SHAPES are derived from the Neon CRM REST API v2 (v2.11) OAS3 spec example payloads + the developer-portal documented list/search envelope (a `pagination` object alongside a resource-named collection array, single-record GETs returning the object directly). All VALUES are synthetic / PII-scrubbed test data, not captured real responses. No live API was hit to produce these.

piiSafety.ids: well-formed but synthetic integer ids (needed for FK/PK + watermark verification)

sources.UsedFor: list/search `pagination` envelope shape, single-record GET shape, page-number pagination params (currentPage 0-based + pageSize), timestamps.lastModifiedDateTime incremental cursor
account / donation / membership object field shapes, Basic auth scheme, NEON-API-VERSION header

edgeCasesCovered: single-record GET (object returned directly, no envelope)
out-of-order modified dates across a batch (max-seen, not most-recent)
